hero.title: Find patterns, automate them, prove outcomes with data
hero.desc: 4 years on B2B/B2C platforms. 3.2× signup conversion, 62% payment conversion, and automation born from a new joiner's friction.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.c1Summary: 30+ file 7-step refactor with zero regressions, plus a /release workflow built iteratively from a new joiner's friction
projects.c2Title: B2C OTA expansion — dual payment system
projects.c2Summary: Resolved a PSP approval-timeline risk by splitting Toss (domestic) and Stripe (international), keeping the launch schedule and reaching 62% payment conversion
projects.c3Title: AI collaboration infra — layered Claude Code config
projects.c3Summary: A layered config architecture that separates context and permissions along domain boundaries in the monorepo. Custom Skills, Hooks, and 4 MCP integrations automate repetitive workflows and external-context entry

about.title: Engineering Philosophy
about.desc: Code should fit in one engineer's head. When a pattern is clear I automate it; when it isn't, I form a hypothesis and validate with data. I treat UI as a function of state, and use AI suggestions only when they preserve layer boundaries.

resumePage.title: Resume
resumePage.summaryDesc: Frontend engineer with 4 years of experience prioritizing user value and business impact. I improve products through hypothesis → experiment → data-driven decisions.

projectsPage.subtitle: Technical decisions, trade-offs, failures, and what I learned
